title: Downstream Product Boundary Proofs
description: Demonstrate that Media Blitz, Career Intelligence and Placement, and Personal Cognitive Continuity can consume Enki through scoped no-effect adapters without redefining the core or acquiring unauthorized authority.
acceptance_criteria: Each downstream suite uses an explicit consumer contract and no-effect TEST adapter
Consumer-specific views and packages preserve provenance, context, privacy, and authority
Products cannot write predictions, recommendations, publication decisions, or inferred preferences directly into canonical Enki state
Cross-product data leakage, authority reuse, and audience widening fail closed
At least one end-to-end TEST proof passes for each downstream suite

evidence.description: Implemented all three downstream product boundary proofs and no-effect adapters.
CI passed downstream end-to-end and adversarial boundary tests.
Runtime Coverage passed every declared Sprint 22 path.
Work Control Authority passed before promotion.
